body:
🔓 VIP — your SKRUSDT long played out 👇

🔺 SKRUSDT — LONG (Bitunix · 15m)
ID: SKR-L-20260628
Move from the entry zone to the high: +5.06% (spot) — tagged all three targets (TP1 0.00864 · TP2 0.00875 · TP3 0.00881).

You had this call first. Exactly the map: bounce off the 0.786 fib + rising trendline, straight back up. SL at 0.00830 before entry — capped risk first.

That's the clean spot move; your leverage scales it. Not every setup lands like this — the discipline is what makes the green ones count. Manage your own size.

#RealResults
